Dear Reservations Team,

I am writing to request information regarding room availability at your hotel for next weekend. We are planning a stay arriving on Friday and departing on Sunday. Could you please confirm your availability during this period and provide the current rate schedule? Additionally, please let us know if any special requests can be accommodated upon arrival.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks for your help.<|im_end|>
